seoTitle: Ulverstone vs Underwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ulverstone and Underwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ulverstone and Underwood.
heading: Ulverstone vs Underwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ulverstone, Tasmania and Underwood, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ulverstone has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Underwood (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ulverstone or Underwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ulverstone has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Underwood scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ulverstone scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Underwood scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ulverstone or Underwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ulverstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
